docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PLAINTIFF PIER, LAVERSA AS TO DEFENDANT RAIFSNIDER, MICHAEL J.
MOTION /PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT RAIFSNIDER, MICHAEL J. HEARING SET FOR JAN-30-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION /PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD CONTINUED FROM JAN-30-1996 TO FEB-14-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
PETITIONERS DECLARATION IN OPPOSITION TO RESPONDENT'S NOTICE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAVERSA PIER.
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION /PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, CALENDAR OF FEB-14-1996, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER SEE EXECUTED ORDER.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT RAIFSNIDER, MICHAEL J. RESPONDENT, MICHAEL J. RAIFSNIDER, AWARDED $5,930.00 PLUS COSTS OF $94.00.

REMITTITUR FILED IT IS ORDERED BY THE COURT THAT THE JUDGMENT MADE & ENTERED IN THE MUNICIPAL COURT, CCSF, IN THE ABOVE ENTITLED CAUSE IS HEREBY AFFIRMED. COSTS ARE HEREBY AWARDED THE PREVAILING PARTY.
